text:
Cashew (カシュー, Kashū) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Cashew is a young woman with fair hair on top, but dark on the sides and back. She has a long fringe that falls on the left side of her face. She has droopy eyes, thick lips, and prominent lower lashes. 

Personality

Like her fellow Heil-Ly members, Cashew has sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing people. Unlike Luini's desire to level up quickly, Cashew wants to take her time to deceive the investigation team so that she can have fun. She is very deceptive while doing so, able to lie and cry in Mizaistom's presence. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 379 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Cashew is seen with the other Heil-Ly members as Morena uses her Contagion on them one at a time and explains how her Nen ability works. 

In the general passenger area on Tier 3, several soldiers cordon off the area as a large crowd begins to gather. An official tells them to stay back and that the area will be off-limits until forensics is done with the scene. Mizaistom asks someone how many victims there are, and the person says twenty, adding that the perpetrator entered the room disguised as Royal Army and killed quickly. Mizaistom wonders if Nen was involved, but the person replies that they only know a blade was used, with no sign of an ability. Mizaistom describes it as a random attack and asks if there are any witnesses. The person says that there is a witness who described the perpetrator as in his twenties, slender, 6' to 6'2", with a crescent scar on his left cheek. They add that canvassing the area didn't return any eyewitness accounts of someone who fits that description, guessing that their testimony may be flawed because of confusion from shock. Mizaistom then sternly asks to speak to the witness. 

Mizaistom eventually goes to the scene of the crime, and Cashew begins to recount what happened. She first says that she heard a knock, and the victim went to the door. Once she opened it, Cashew then heard someone collapse, calling out but getting no answer. As Cashew opened the bathroom, she saw the perpetrator standing there before he quickly ordered her to move and threatened to kill her if she made a noise. After seeing the victim's body on the floor, Cashew emphasizes how afraid she was and says that she made sure to focus on following his orders so that he would spare her life. As she was desperately hoping that he wouldn't kill her, she remembers the man talking about levels and how many people he needed to kill. She then heard a scream outside the room and the sounds of people running, pounding on doors, and more screams. 

She tells Mizaistom that the man locked the bathroom door from the inside, and Mizaistom is left confused. She explains that she sat there until the Royal Army pried the door open, revealing that he had somehow escaped. Mizaistom points out that the pipes aren't even big enough for a rat, and Cashew is certain that he didn't come out, adding that the soldiers confirmed the door was locked. She then pleads with Mizaistom to catch the man and ask him. Mizaistom begins to analyze the situation with himself, wondering why he would have left a witness alive and emphasizing that the various words the man used are clues to the mystery. Mizaistom asks how she knew the victim, and Cashew replies that they hit it off right away after they happened to sit next to each other to eat. She then begins to cry, saying that the woman wanted advice about her personal life and she didn't get to give it to her. Mizaistom kneels down beside her and tells her to go rest in her cabin, adding that they will talk to her again. 

After Mizaistom escorts her away from the scene, Cashew's expression instantly changes, and it's revealed that she is a level 1 member of the Heil-Ly Family. In a flashback, Cashew explains her plan to Luini, saying that she will mix the truth with lies and make sure that it hints at why she wasn't killed. Luini praises her idea and tells her to describe his scar accurately. Cashew asks if he's sure, and Luini replies that he wants to know their investigative ability, clarifying that he wants to know how long it takes between being identified and getting found. Cashew again asks if he's sure, pointing out that he will be put to death if he is caught. Luini assures her that he won't get caught and adds that even if he does, he will escape. He then remembers Morena's line about their ability providing for them if they wish hard enough. With aura swelling around him, he finally says that he has been bestowed with a gift and the power will take him where he wants to go. 

Back in the present, Cashew says that Luini disappeared from the bathroom after that, guessing it's a transportation ability and saying that she doesn't care for it. She asks herself if it's fun to get it over with so quickly, adding that she will level up slowly and ask for the gift. Lastly, she says that she has succeeded in contacting the investigators and will now get to know them better, licking her lips with delight. 

At 10 a.m. on the fourth day of the voyage, Cashew is shown to be in a standard cabin on Tier 3. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 380 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Cashew is named after the nut that can be used in desserts. She shares a similar origin of her name with every other female member of the Heil-Ly Family: Soufflé, Gelato, Montblanc Toto, and Chiffon Toto.
